## 🔧 Type of change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] 🏗️ Refactor

## 🧪 Testing
- [ ] `pytest -v` passes
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] New tests added for new logic

## 🔐 Security checklist (if touching security-sensitive code)
- [ ] No secrets in code
- [ ] AI output treated as untrusted
- [ ] External input validated at boundaries
- [ ] `/submit` / `/reject` authorization checked

## 📚 Skill compliance
- [ ] Followed `skills/spec-driven-development/` (if new feature)
- [ ] Followed `skills/incremental-implementation/` (thin slices)
- [ ] Followed `skills/test-driven-development/` (red-green-refactor)
- [ ] Followed `skills/code-review-and-quality/` (self-reviewed)
- [ ] Followed `skills/security-and-hardening/` (if security-sensitive)
- [ ] Followed `skills/git-workflow-and-versioning/` (~100 lines, atomic commit)
